phrases.text_local: Pode recomendar uma galeria de arte autêntica perto daqui?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih reh-koo-mayng-DAHR OO-muh guh-lih-REEUH DIH AH-ruh-tih ow-TAYNG-tee-kuh PEHR-too duh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao galerista na Rua Miguel Bombarda; eles conhecem bem a zona.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-lih-REESH-tuh NUH ROOUH mee-GEHL boom-BAH-ruh-duh; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG AH ZOH-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the art dealer on Rua Miguel Bombarda; they know the area well.

responses.english: Ask the art dealer on Rua Miguel Bombarda; they know the area well.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-lih-REESH-tuh NUH ROOUH mee-GEHL boom-BAH-ruh-duh; EH-lihsh koo-NYEH-sayng BAYNG AH ZOH-nuh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao galerista na Rua Miguel Bombarda; eles conhecem bem a zona.

phrases.text_local: Como chego às galerias da Rua Miguel Bombarda?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo UHUHSH guh-lih-REEUHSH DUH ROOUH mee-GEHL boom-BAH-ruh-duh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Rua Miguel Bombarda.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh ROOUH mee-GEHL boom-BAH-ruh-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Rua Miguel Bombarda.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Rua Miguel Bombarda.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh ROOUH mee-GEHL boom-BAH-ruh-duh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para Rua Miguel Bombarda.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar boutiques na Rua de Cedofeita?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR boow-TEE-kihsh NUH ROOUH DIH seh-doo-FAY-tuh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um lojista na Rua de Cedofeita.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG loo-ZHEESH-tuh NUH ROOUH DIH seh-doo-FAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a boutique clerk on Rua de Cedofeita.

responses.english: Ask a boutique clerk on Rua de Cedofeita.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG loo-ZHEESH-tuh NUH ROOUH DIH seh-doo-FAY-tuh.
responses.local: Pergunte a um lojista na Rua de Cedofeita.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Rua Miguel Bombarda galleries are
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as galerias da Rua Miguel Bombarda?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH guh-lih-REEUHSH DUH ROOUH mee-GEHL boom-BAH-ruh-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: Rua Miguel Bombarda is a street known for its art galleries; the galleries are the main attraction along that street.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada do Mercado do Bolhão?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo DOO boo-LYOWN?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Mercado do Bolhão.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo DOO boo-LYOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Mercado do Bolhão.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Mercado do Bolhão.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo DOO boo-LYOWN.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Mercado do Bolhão.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Igreja de Cedofeita is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Igreja de Cedofeita?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH seh-doo-FAY-tuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The church features a well-preserved Romanesque main portal.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a igreja.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH eeg-REH-zhuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the church.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the church.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH eeg-REH-zhuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a igreja.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Praça da República is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Praça da República?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The square is a central hub for outdoor dining and transit.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Praça da República.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Praça da República.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Praça da República.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PRAH-suh DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Praça da República.
